relationship.description: Each employee belongs to one department; a department can have many employees.
Each employee holds one position; a position can be held by many employees.
Each employee is assigned a salary level; a salary level can apply to many employees.
An employee may be supervised by another employee (self‑referencing).
Each position is associated with a salary level; many positions can share the same salary level.

metadata.improvements_made: Standardized attribute names (phone_number), added missing contact and employment fields (email, hire_date) to EMPLOYEE, introduced a description field for POSITION, replaced redundant salary_grade with a foreign key salary_level_id and added a POSITION‑to‑SALARY_LEVEL relationship, removed the redundant DEPARTMENT‑EMPLOYEE 1:1 relationship by keeping supervisor_id as a foreign key in DEPARTMENT, and documented business rule that employee salary must fall within the associated salary level range.
